description_long: This object consists of two compact, low-profile computer keyboards placed side by side, one in a light gray color and the other in black. Both keyboards feature a standard QWERTY key layout with chiclet-style keys, and each has a row of function keys along the top. The keycaps are flat and closely spaced, with clear, high-contrast legends for easy visibility. The keyboards appear to be wireless, as there are no visible cables or connectors. Their slim, rectangular bodies are made primarily of plastic, with a slight elevation towards the back for ergonomic typing. The overall design is modern and minimalist, suitable for use in offices, homes, or public urban workspaces.
description: A pair of slim, modern wireless keyboards—one gray, one black—with chiclet keys and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both keyboards side by side, highlighting the key layouts and color contrast.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the slim profile and slight rear elevation of the keyboards.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of both keyboards, with no visible ports or connectors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness and the key arrangement from a different angle.
